hero.slide2_slogan: You choose the car, we bring it safely

about.subtitle: Welcome to the official SwissCars.md page
about.title: About Us
about.text: SwissCars has been successfully engaged in the transport and sale of cars for over 10 years. We order any car from Switzerland, first conducting a thorough inspection. We are a responsive, professional team that can guide and advise you as needed.
about.mission_text: For over a decade, SwissCars has been the trusted partner for those looking for not just a car, but a premium experience. We pride ourselves on a rigorous selection and adjustment process that leaves no room for compromise.
about.value1_text: Every detail about the car's history and import costs is presented to you clearly, with no hidden fees.
about.value2_text: We only select cars that meet the high standards of maintenance specific to the Swiss market.
about.value3_text: From the first consultation to the final registration in Moldova, we are with you every step of the way.
about.step1_text: We discuss your needs and find the best options on the Swiss market.
about.step2_text: We technically and aesthetically inspect the car before any transaction.
about.step3_text: We ensure secure transport and support for customs clearance.

recent.subtitle: Choose the car of your dreams
recent.title: Recent Arrivals

stats.partnerships_text: We import cars from Switzerland and when needed provide consulting and support for vehicle registration.
stats.question: Have a question?

services.title: Services
services.service1_short: We find the best solutions on the external market.
services.service1_full: We find the best solutions on the external market. We negotiate the best price with the seller and provide full transaction transparency.
services.service2_short: We conduct a thorough inspection before import.
services.service2_full: We conduct a thorough inspection of the vehicle to be imported. If any defects are found, they are fixed before the purchase transaction.
services.service3_short: We safely transport any type of vehicle.
services.service3_full: We safely transport any type of vehicle. If you find a car in Switzerland, we ensure inspection and transportation.
services.service4_short: We sell quality cars with original mileage.
services.service4_full: We search for the best deals on the Swiss market and import them to Moldova. We sell cars in their original condition, without tampering with the odometer.
services.service5_full: We provide maintenance support during transport. We also assist with negotiations, customs clearance, and vehicle registration in Moldova.
services.service6_short: We offer technical support for transport services.
services.service6_full: If you identify a technical defect, we guarantee technical support in resolving it.

contact_banner.title: See the best offers!
contact_banner.text: We offer a wide range of cars at competitive prices and top quality.
contact_banner.question: Have a question?

whyus.title: Why Us?
whyus.q1_text: For 10 years we have proven that we can provide quality services and respond promptly to every request.
whyus.q2_text: Once you find the car you want, we bring it to the country safely and provide support with customs clearance.
whyus.q3_text: In every negotiation we ensure full transaction transparency.
whyus.q4_text: Your request is our offer. Based on discussions, we find the best cars on the Swiss market, considering both price and quality.

dual_cta.left_title: Looking for a good car for a long time?
dual_cta.right_text: We have the solution — cars from Switzerland!

leasing.title: Basic Principles of Leasing Sales
leasing.text1: The buyer pays a certain portion of the car's price (down payment), then pays a fixed monthly amount to fully acquire the car over a certain period (the lease term). For its services, the leasing company typically charges the buyer a one-time commission upon signing the lease agreement.
leasing.text2: No collateral is required from the buyer. The car must be insured annually against all risks (CASCO insurance). Insurance costs are borne by the buyer. The insurance cost may vary depending on the leasing company.
leasing.calculator_subtitle: Estimated calculation — final terms depend on the leasing company
